blurb_en:
GitHub Copilot's first metered billing cycle closed June 30, and agentic developers opened invoices ranging from 10x to 50x their old flat-rate subscriptions.
• A $29/month plan is running at $750; a $50 plan at $3,000.
• Agentic coding tasks consume roughly 1,000x more tokens than a standard single-turn query — according to GitHub's own research, published six weeks after the billing switch went live.
• GitHub offers spending caps. Finding the setting is left as an exercise for the developer.
• For Insta360 engineers running Copilot in app or firmware workflows, exposure depends on how agentically you’re pushing it — but anyone opening a surprise invoice today has a very strong opinion about ‘AI Credits.’
• Flat-rate AI is over. Usage-based billing is great for the entity selling compute.
blurb_zh:
GitHub Copilot的首个按量计费周期于6月30日结算，重度「代理编程」用户收到了高出原套餐价10至50倍的账单。
• 29美元/月的套餐实际花费高达750美元；50美元套餐则冲到3000美元。
• 代理编程任务消耗的令牌量约为普通单轮对话的1000倍——这一数据来自GitHub自家研究，发布时间恰好是新计费模式上线六周之后。
• GitHub提供消费上限设置功能。如何找到入口，请自行探索。
• 按量计费就是好，对卖算力的一方来说。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechTimes (June 29), The Register (June 2), TechCrunch (May 30 preview), Visual Studio Magazine (June 4). Multiple independent sources confirm 10-50x cost increases for agentic workflows. GitHub own research (published ~6 weeks after switch) confirmed agentic tasks use ~1000x more tokens than single-turn queries.

blurb_en:
Krea AI uploaded the weights for its 12-billion-parameter image model to Hugging Face on June 23, making them free to download, fine-tune, and run locally.
• Two variants: Raw, an undistilled mid-training checkpoint with no aesthetic alignment — ideal for LoRA training without stylistic bias — and Turbo, a distilled variant generating 2K images in about two seconds on a consumer GPU.
• The community license allows free commercial use for individuals and teams under 50 seats.
• Krea launched the same model commercially on June 4; the open weights are the version that matters to people who’d rather run it than pay API fees.
• Designers building custom fine-tunes — product photography, camera-style outputs, brand-consistent image pipelines — now have a 12B foundation to start from without writing a single API contract.
• Krea requires any hosting platform to run content classifiers on inputs and outputs. Responsible AI, or a permission slip for community goodwill? Probably both.
blurb_zh:
Krea AI于6月23日将旗下120亿参数图像模型权重上传至Hugging Face，免费开放下载、微调与本地部署。
• 两个版本：Raw版为无对齐处理的训练中间检查点，适合零偏见LoRA训练；Turbo版经过蒸馏，可在消费级显卡上约2秒生成2K图像。
• 社区许可协议允许个人及50人以下团队免费商用。
• 该模型曾于6月26日以API形式商业上线；开源权重版，才是更多人真正等待的版本。
• 做产品摄影、相机风格输出或品牌图像流程的设计师，现在有了一个无需签API合同的120亿参数起点。
• 叫做「负责任的AI」，也可以说是一张换取社区好感的免责声明。
verification_notes: VentureBeat returned HTTP 403; claims verified via cross-reference with Meteora (meteoraweb.com), Digg (digg.com/tech/zsk4g1je), Medium (Max Quimby, Jun 2026), and Hugging Face model cards (huggingface.co/krea/Krea-2-Turbo, krea/Krea-2-Raw). Release date June 23 confirmed by multiple sources. Prior story 2026-06-15-krea-2-turbo-launch covers commercial API launch (June 4); this covers the distinct open-weights release to Hugging Face.
